title: campanula linifolia var. humilis
intro: Campanula linifolia var. humilis is a low-growing, creeping perennial plant belonging to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been valued for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as promote wound healing. Campanula linifolia var. humilis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and support overall well-being.
